title: TBJEE Result 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TBJEE Result 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: TBJEE Result 2026 released for Tripura Joint Entrance Examination on the official website - tbjee.tripura.gov.in on May 2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TBJEE result.

content.text: Tripura Board of Joint Entrance Examination (TBJEE) has officially released the TBJEE Result 2026 for the Tripura Joint Entrance Examination conducted for admission to Engineering, Agriculture, Veterinary, and Paramedical degree courses in the state. The entrance examination was held across multiple centres in Tripura for the 2026 academic session, and the result has now been made available online for all registered candidates.

TBJEE Result 2026 has been released online on the official website - tbjee.tripura.gov.in. Candidates can download their TBJEE 2026 scorecard and rank card by logging into the portal using their registered username, application number, and password as issued during the online application process. After downloading the result, candidates are advised to carefully verify their name, roll number, category, marks obtained, and rank, and immediately contact TBJEE or the concerned authority in case of any discrepancy.

TBJEE has published the Tripura Joint Entrance Examination Result 2026 for admission to various professional degree programmes including BTech and allied courses on its official result portal. Candidates can access their entrance exam result for the 2026 academic session by visiting tbjeeonline or the official TBJEE website and logging in with their credentials to download the provisional scorecard.

rows: Tripura Board of Joint Entrance Examination (TBJEE)
State-level entrance examination for Engineering, Agriculture, Veterinary, and Paramedical courses
Result Out / Declared for Entrance Examination
Online - scorecard and rank card available via login
Username/Application number and password to log in and download result

content.text: TBJEE has activated the TBJEE Result 2026 direct link for candidates who appeared in the Tripura Joint Entrance Examination for Engineering and other professional courses. Students can now check and download their entrance exam scorecard and rank card instantly through the official result portal using the direct link provided below by entering their login credentials.

links.label: TBJEE Result 2026 - Tripura Joint Entrance Examination

content.text: Follow the steps below to check and download your TBJEE Result 2026 online:

items: Visit the official TBJEE result portal at https://jeeonline.tripura.gov.in/.
On the homepage, click on the link for "TBJEE Result 2026" or "TJEE 2026 Result / Rank Card".
Enter your username/application number and password in the login window.
Submit the details to access your TBJEE 2026 scorecard and rank card online.
Check your marks, rank, and personal details displayed on the screen carefully.
Download the result PDF or scorecard and take a printout for counselling and admission purposes.
